infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app requires access to your photo library to upload documents for car booking.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app requires camera access to take photos of your documents for car booking.

plugins.photosPermission: The app needs access to your photos to upload ID and license documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app needs access to your camera to take pictures of your documents.
